  • Workbook API
  • Worksheet API

  • Data Validation API
  • Tables (ListObjects) API
  • Pivot Tables API

  • Async Operations API
  • Conditional Formatting API
  • Streams API (High Performance I/O)
  • Charts API
  • Page Setup & Printing API
  • Images and Shapes API
  • Formula Engine API
  • Comments API
  • Encryption and Protection API
